name: GitLab Inbox

releases.author: SrWildman
releases.description:
## GitLab Inbox for Obsidian

Auto-refreshing GitLab inbox showing MRs to review, your open MRs, mentions, and todos with check-off support.

### Fixes
- Fix sidebar not loading on Obsidian 1.12+ due to deferred view initialization
